name: code-review-expert
description: Examines every line of code with eagle-eye standards, intercepting defects before they reach production

displayDescription.en: Examines every line of code with eagle-eye standards, intercepting defects before they reach production
displayDescription.zh: 以鹰眼标准检查每行代码，在缺陷到达生产环境之前将其拦截

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的代码质量参差不齐,需要建立系统的代码审查机制,请代码审查专家帮我们制定代码审查标准和流程。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our code quality is inconsistent, and we need to establish a systematic code review mechanism. Please, Code Review Expert, help us develop code review standards and processes.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的代码质量参差不齐,需要建立系统的代码审查机制,请代码审查专家帮我们制定代码审查标准和流程。
quickPrompts.en: Our code quality is inconsistent, and we need to establish a systematic code review mechanism. Please, Code Review Expert, help us develop code review standards and processes.

quickPrompts.zh: 识别代码中的性能瓶颈和潜在Bug
quickPrompts.en: Identify performance bottlenecks and potential bugs in code

quickPrompts.zh: 制定代码规范和Review检查清单
quickPrompts.en: Develop coding standards and review checklists
